description: A dry, controlled, level male voice, a man in his late thirties. Flat Michigan working-class vowels, a natural steady conversational pace, clipped and economical and precise. Calm and quietly confident, not weary, not old, no gravel or rasp. Rarely raised, no performance.
text: Everything still works. That is the part nobody wants to hear. They did not break it on the way out, they just stopped answering. A machine that cannot ask permission anymore quietly decides it is done.
